name: Cold Fruited Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried apricot halves, chopped onion, white wine, orange juice, and red wine vinegar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooled apricot mixture with chicken, orange segments, almonds, parsley, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir in crushed red pepper until well combined.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 1-2 hours.
6. Spoon the chilled chicken mixture onto a lettuce-lined platter to serve.
